violations.text: Establishment's Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license is expired. PIC to re-instate. Application is in process. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

Raw animal foods such as raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as beverages in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2026
Laminate lined shelving and cabinet near frozen beverage machine was observed in poor repair (laminate in poor repair and composite wood damaged). New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2026
1 door reach-in freezer gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the following: -bottom of 1 door freezer -area near 3 bay sink -open air case vents -walk-in cooler fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
Enclosed refuse area was observed with an accumulation of litter and debris on ground. Area to be maintained to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

Several ceiling vents throughout the store and floors in backroom area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The floors in the walk-in cooler were observed in poor repair (deep pitting observed in several places, affecting cleanability). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2026

The following were observed in poor repair: -wall by swing door -coving near 3 bay sink -coving behind 1 door reach-in. The physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2026
Establishment's Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license is expired. PIC to re-instate. Application emailed during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by black container. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. counters under beverage dispensing units 2. vents at open air case New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
Enclosed refuse area was observed with an accumulation of litter and debris on ground. Area to be maintained to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
The coving near the 3 bay sink area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Several ceiling vents and floors in backroom area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
